_comment_: Manual game title aliases. Keys are LOWERCASE, normalized input names (lower-cased, no punctuation, articles removed, '&' → 'and'). Values are the exact library game name (any case, any punctuation). Edit this file by hand when an import keeps failing for the same game. After editing, restart the app or POST /api/admin/reload-aliases to apply.
_examples_: Below are starter entries. Add your own under the same shape.
skyrim special edition: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Special Edition
skyrim anniversary edition: The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim Special Edition
dark souls prepare to die edition: Dark Souls: Prepare to Die Edition
fallout 3 game of the year edition: Fallout 3 - Game of the Year Edition
